blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: You haven't heard the full pitch.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I don't need the full pitch.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Condemned means liability. The rungs are solid. You can see the whole town from up there.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: How do you know the rungs are solid?

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I believe they are solid.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: That is not the same thing as knowing.
Kit looked east. The old water tower was just visible over the tree line.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Rungs don't rust through in six years.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You don't know how old they are.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I looked. From the fence.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You looked at the rungs from the fence.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: They looked solid from the fence.
Daisy stared at him.
Eli leaned in from behind.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I heard there's still stuff in the barn. One of the Crenshaw twins said there's a saddle in there.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Why would there be a saddle.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Horses, probably.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Eli.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: There were probably horses at some point.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Then where did they—
She stopped.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I'm not asking that.
Kit watched Savannah reach up and pull her hair back into a ponytail.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Savannah.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: I'm just fixing my hair.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: In preparation for climbing a condemned water tower.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: I make no promises.
Daisy looked at all three of them. Then at her empty cup.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: If any of us gets tetanus, I want it on record that I said rusted rungs.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Noted. For the record.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I'm serious, Kit.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I know. It's in the record.
She got on her bike.
He didn't smile about it until he was a few feet ahead of her, where she couldn't see.
